a:T28b1,<div class="question">
<p>Consider the following reaction:</p>
<p style="text-align: left;padding-left:90px;">N<sub>2</sub> (g) + 3H<sub>2</sub> (g) <span class="mjpage"><math alttext=" \rightleftharpoons " xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML">
<mo stretchy="false">⇌</mo>
</math></span> 2NH<sub>3</sub> (g)</p>
<p>       <img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p>Which calculation gives Δ<em>H</em><sup>Θ</sup>, in kJ, for the forward reaction?</p>
<p>A.   2<em>z</em> − <em>y</em> − 3<em>x</em></p>
<p>B.   <em>y</em> + 3<em>x</em> − 2<em>z</em></p>
<p>C.   <em>y</em> + 3<em>x</em> − 6<em>z</em></p>
<p>D.   6<em>z</em> − <em>y</em> − 3<em>x</em></p>
<p> </p>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/chemistry/topic/5/","children":["← back to ","Chemistry"," topic ","5"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"18N.1.SL.TZ0.15"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Chemistry"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","1"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"18N"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","5-3-bond-enthalpies"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>C</p>\n</div>"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n[N/A]\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
